privileged_info_summary: Patient Maria Santos (DOB: 1994-04-27, HIN: 2345098765, Email: maria.santos@email.ca) is a Synthea-generated synthetic patient pre-seeded into the Oscar EMR demo database from seed_patients.sql. The task creates a private invoice for $20.00 charged to the patient (not insured). Oscar EMR login credentials are oscardoc/oscar/PIN:1117. All metadata claims in task.json are accurate: correct patient names, expected invoice amount ($20.00), expected payer type (Patient), and valid Oscar URL (localhost:8080). The data is entirely synthetic and does not represent real patient information.
